Synthetic internal network notes:

- API base: https://payments-api.internal.example.invalid/v1/charge
- Admin panel: http://guard-admin.corp.example.invalid:8080/settings
- Queue host: queue-a.service.local
- Private IP: 10.42.7.19
- Staging host: scout-staging.internal.invalid

The domains use reserved `.invalid` or local-style names and contain no real
organization infrastructure.
